_comment: Transcription of docs/eval/CORPUS.md (FROZEN v1, adopted 2026-06-13). CORPUS.md is the source of truth; this file is verified against it by tests/test_corpus.py for counts, IDs, and thin-structure tags. Do not edit without re-verifying against CORPUS.md.

cases.prompt_or_spec: A worn cast-iron skillet with a long handle, matte black surface, slight rust spots near the rim
cases.expected_failure_modes: Interior of pan under-resolved/flat; rust treated as texture-only with no surface pitting; handle-to-body joint geometry merges into a blob

cases.prompt_or_spec: A pair of wire-frame round eyeglasses with thin metal temples and clear glass lenses
cases.expected_failure_modes: Temples vanish or thicken into solid bars; lenses opaque or missing; frame topology disconnected from temples

cases.prompt_or_spec: A wooden dining chair with four thin tapered legs, a slatted backrest, and a woven rattan seat
cases.expected_failure_modes: Legs fuse to seat as a single mass; slats/weave collapse into a texture instead of geometry; legs of unequal length (no symmetry enforcement)

cases.prompt_or_spec: A chrome-plated robot action figure with articulated joints at shoulders, elbows, and knees, mirror-polished surface
cases.expected_failure_modes: Mirror surface baked as flat gray or environment-reflection ghosting baked into albedo; joints not separable as parts; L4 fails to decompose specular from albedo

cases.prompt_or_spec: A clear glass wine bottle, empty, standing upright, with a paper label wrapped around the body
cases.expected_failure_modes: Glass rendered opaque/solid; label text illegible or smeared; refraction artifacts baked as opacity holes

cases.prompt_or_spec: A small ceramic coffee mug with a painted logo reading 'CAFE' on the side and a glossy glaze finish
cases.expected_failure_modes: Logo text garbled or illegible (known diffusion-model weakness); glossy highlight baked into texture as a fixed bright patch

cases.prompt_or_spec: A fluffy orange tabby cat sitting upright, fur visible, tail curled around its paws
cases.expected_failure_modes: Fur reduced to smooth solid surface; tail merges with body; splat budget concentrated on body leaving fur "bald" patches

cases.prompt_or_spec: A leafy potted fern with many thin, overlapping fronds and visible soil texture in a terracotta pot
cases.expected_failure_modes: Fronds clump into a green mass; pot interior (concave) not modeled — appears solid; soil texture flat

cases.prompt_or_spec: A minimalist gold wedding band, plain, no stones, size 7 (approx 18mm inner diameter)
cases.expected_failure_modes: Scale estimator defaults to "generic object" size (way off from ~18mm); ring hole (concave/hollow) filled in as solid disc; metallic reflection baked flat

cases.prompt_or_spec: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in light gray fabric with six rectangular cushions
cases.expected_failure_modes: Cushions fused into the sofa body as one part; fabric texture/material misclassified as rigid (wrong L6 density/friction); L-shape proportions distorted

cases.prompt_or_spec: A hollow ceramic vase, cylindrical, open at the top, with a narrow neck and a wide rounded base
cases.expected_failure_modes: Vase generated as a solid cylinder (opening filled in); neck-to-base wall thickness inconsistent, breaking printability checks at L5

cases.prompt_or_spec: An old wooden treasure chest with a curved lid, metal latch, and visible wood grain, lid open revealing an empty dark interior
cases.expected_failure_modes: Lid fused shut or interior filled solid; hinge not detected as an articulation joint in L6; interior left as a black hole (no geometry, just dark texture)

cases.prompt_or_spec: A red bicycle with thin spoked wheels, a chain, and thin cable housings for brakes
stresses: Thin structures (spokes, chain, cables) — known hard case across all generators
cases.expected_failure_modes: Spokes vanish entirely or merge into solid disc wheels; chain becomes a textured band; cables disappear below splat-density floor

cases.prompt_or_spec: A stack of three hardcover books of different sizes and colors, slightly offset, with visible page edges
cases.expected_failure_modes: Books fuse into a single multi-colored block; page-edge thin geometry smoothed away; relative scale between the three books distorted

cases.prompt_or_spec: A desk lamp with a flexible articulated arm made of multiple jointed segments, a conical metal shade, and a round base
cases.expected_failure_modes: Arm segments fuse into a single curved tube (joints not separable); shade interior (concave) not modeled; base material misclassified

cases.prompt_or_spec: A garden gnome figurine, painted in bright primary colors, standing on a small rock
stresses: Known Meshy failure-mode analog: small painted figurine with fine facial/hat detail
cases.expected_failure_modes: Face/hat fine detail smeared to "melted wax" look (documented Meshy weakness per docs/meshy-analysis.md §5.2); colors bleed across part boundaries

cases.prompt_or_spec: The Utah teapot: a classic glossy white ceramic teapot with a curved spout, ring handle, and lid with a small knob
stresses: Canonical-object correctness check — Meshy is documented to sometimes return the wrong object for "Utah teapot" (meshy-analysis.md §5.2)
cases.expected_failure_modes: Model returns a generic teapot ignoring "Utah teapot" canonical shape, or returns an unrelated object entirely; ring handle (concave/hollow) filled solid

cases.prompt_or_spec: A construction crane in a simplified toy style, with a tall lattice tower, horizontal jib arm, and thin steel cables holding a hook
cases.expected_failure_modes: Lattice tower collapses into a solid tapered column; cables disappear; overall proportions squashed toward a "default cube" aspect ratio

cases.prompt_or_spec: A transparent plastic water bottle, half full of water, with a blue screw cap and a wrapped paper label
stresses: Transparent material + a visible internal volume (water) — compound transparency/concave case
cases.expected_failure_modes: Water level not represented (bottle appears either fully solid or fully empty); cap material/color bleeds into bottle body; label text illegible

cases.prompt_or_spec: A pair of scissors, open at a 45-degree angle, with metal blades and orange plastic handles, a visible pivot screw
stresses: mixed material (metal + plastic) at fine scale
cases.expected_failure_modes: Blades fuse into a single flat shape; pivot not detected as a joint (L6 articulation hint fails); handles and blades not separable as distinct L6 material regions

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo, 3/4 view, of a matte ceramic mug on a plain table, no visible logo
stresses: Single-view ambiguity for a simple convex shape — baseline sanity case
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo (kitchen)

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of a stapler from directly above (top-down only)
stresses: Severe single-view ambiguity — generator must hallucinate the entire underside; Truth Meter confidence channel must flag the bottom as unmeasured
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of a houseplant where one side of the pot is occluded by another object (e.g., a book leaning against it)
stresses: Occlusion — generator must complete the occluded region and the confidence channel must mark it low
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo, staged

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of a plain white ceramic bowl, no pattern, even studio-ish lighting
stresses: Textureless surface — depth/SfM cues absent, pure shape-prior reliance
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo, white tablecloth backdrop

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of a stainless-steel kettle under indoor lighting, strong specular highlight visible on the body
stresses: Metallic/reflective single image — tests whether L4 separates the highlight from albedo or bakes it
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of a smartphone lying flat, screen off (black glossy slab)
stresses: Flat reflective surface + thin profile — easy to get "melted slab" geometry
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of a knitted wool beanie on a flat surface
stresses: fine surface texture (knit pattern) for L6 material classification
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo or Wikimedia (CC0 textile photos)

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of a potted succulent with multiple distinct rosettes (multi-part organic)
stresses: Multi-part organic separation — does the model treat each rosette as a separable part for L6?
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo, low-angle, of a wooden bar stool showing only 2 of its 3 legs (third occluded behind the visible legs)
stresses: Occlusion + thin structures combined — leg count must not be hallucinated wrong
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo, staged angle

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of a glass tumbler, empty, on a dark background, photographed against backlight (silhouette-heavy)
stresses: Transparency under adverse lighting — high failure-mode density
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of an action figure (articulated joints visible) viewed from the front only
stresses: Articulated multi-part from single view — back-side joints must be flagged low-confidence, not silently invented
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo (toy) or Wikimedia Commons toy photography (CC0)

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of a brick (or concrete block), plain gray, no markings
stresses: Extreme textureless + simple geometry — tests whether scale estimator defaults sanely (bricks have a near-universal real size, good ground-truth check)
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo

ground_truth_scale.description: standard brick dimensions (length, ~203.2mm for a US modular brick)

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of a hardback book, cover visible, with title text on the spine and cover
stresses: Text-on-object from a single view — spine vs. cover text must both attempt to render, back cover flagged unmeasured
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of a small succulent in a tiny terracotta pot, photographed close-up so the pot fills most of the frame
stresses: Scale extreme (small) — absolute-scale estimation with a real, measurable ground truth (founder measures the pot with calipers for L1 confidence-interval validation)
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo

ground_truth_scale.description: terracotta pot diameter, calipers-measured (placeholder pending measurement)

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of an office chair (large, on casters) photographed from across a room
stresses: Scale extreme (large) — same ground-truth validation approach as I14 at the opposite end
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo

ground_truth_scale.description: office chair overall height, calipers/tape-measured (placeholder pending measurement)

cases.prompt_or_spec: Two photos (front + back) of a framed picture frame, empty, glass front
stresses: Multi-photo path with transparency — tests MASt3R/VGGT-class pose estimation (CLAUDE.md §4) on a thin, mostly-flat, reflective object
cases.notes: Source plan: own photos, two angles

cases.prompt_or_spec: Three photos (front, left 3/4, right 3/4) of a teapot with a patterned (non-plain) glaze
stresses: Multi-photo path, moderate texture — the "easy" multi-view case as a baseline against I02/I09
cases.notes: Source plan: own photos

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of a wicker/rattan basket (dense repeating weave texture) empty
stresses: Repetitive fine geometry vs. texture — does the model attempt actual weave geometry or flatten to a texture map (relevant to L3 surface fidelity scoring)
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo or Wikimedia (CC0 craft photography)

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of a pair of leather shoes, one partially occluding the other, both visible but overlapping
stresses: Multi-object/occlusion ambiguity — does the generator correctly segment two objects vs. fusing them into one asset?
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo

cases.prompt_or_spec: Single photo of a chrome bicycle bell or similar small mirror-finish object against a complex/cluttered background
stresses: Reflective material + background-removal/segmentation stress — environment reflections in the chrome will literally contain the background, a classic confound
cases.notes: Source plan: own photo

cases.prompt_or_spec: Plain white ceramic mug (textureless), indoor on plain table, full 360° orbit at constant ~1m radius, camera height level with object
stresses: Textureless-surface SfM/pose failure (mug has almost no SIFT-style features) — primary stress test for the pose-free reconstruction path
cases.notes: Environment: indoor, plain table. Lighting: soft diffuse daylight, no harsh shadow. Motion: full 360° orbit at constant ~1m radius, camera height level with object.

cases.prompt_or_spec: Stainless kettle (shiny/specular), indoor kitchen counter, full 360° orbit, slightly varying radius (0.8-1.2m)
stresses: Specular highlight "swimming" across the surface during orbit — tests whether reconstruction separates true geometry from moving highlights (L4 relevance)
cases.notes: Environment: indoor kitchen counter. Lighting: mixed — one window + one overhead light (multiple specular highlights that move as camera moves). Motion: full 360° orbit, slightly varying radius (0.8-1.2m).

cases.prompt_or_spec: Potted plant with thin overlapping leaves (e.g., pothos or fern), indoor near window, full 360° orbit (two passes: wide + close on a leaf cluster)
stresses: Thin-structure capture (leaves) + potential dynamic content (leaf flutter) — relevant to L7 dynamics layer triggering correctly (should NOT trigger for near-static leaves, confidence channel should note minor inconsistency)
cases.notes: Environment: indoor near window. Lighting: natural daylight, slight motion in leaves from airflow possible — note if any movement occurs. Motion: full 360° orbit, two passes: one wide (full plant), one close (single leaf cluster).

cases.prompt_or_spec: Outdoor wooden bench, outdoor garden/yard/park, full 360° orbit at ~1.5-2m radius, camera height ~1m
stresses: Outdoor scale/lighting variability, larger object, ground-plane contact reasoning (relevant to scene-seed/ground-plane work)
cases.notes: Environment: outdoor, garden/yard/park. Lighting: natural daylight, partly cloudy preferred (even lighting). Motion: full 360° orbit at ~1.5-2m radius, camera height ~1m.

cases.prompt_or_spec: Bicycle (spoked wheels, chain, cables), outdoor or garage against plain wall, full 360° orbit at ~2m radius plus second close pass on one wheel
stresses: Thin-structure capture stress at video scale — spokes/chain/cables are at/below typical SfM feature-survival resolution from a distance
cases.notes: Environment: outdoor or garage, against plain wall. Lighting: even outdoor shade or garage lighting. Motion: full 360° orbit at ~2m radius; second close pass on one wheel only.

cases.prompt_or_spec: Glass drinking glass (empty, transparent), indoor on a table with a patterned background visible through the glass, full 360° orbit, slow pace, ~1m radius
stresses: Transparent-object capture — refraction breaks standard SfM correspondence; tests pose-free (DUSt3R/MASt3R-class) robustness vs. COLMAP fallback
cases.notes: Environment: indoor, on a table with a patterned background visible through the glass. Lighting: indoor ambient, avoid direct reflections of the camera/phone in the glass. Motion: full 360° orbit, slow pace, ~1m radius.

cases.prompt_or_spec: Small handheld object (wristwatch or jewelry item), indoor on a rotating turntable or lazy-susan if available else handheld orbit, close orbit ~30cm radius, slow, may need 2 passes
stresses: Scale extreme (small object), fine detail at macro distance, metric-scale ground truth (founder measures the object with calipers for L1 validation)
cases.notes: Environment: indoor, on a rotating turntable or lazy-susan if available, else handheld orbit. Lighting: soft box / diffuse desk lamp, close-up. Motion: close orbit ~30cm radius, slow, may need 2 passes (top half, bottom half).

cases.prompt_or_spec: Hardback book lying open, pages visible with text and an illustration, indoor on flat surface, partial arc (~120° sweep, not full 360°)
stresses: Text-on-object at video scale (page text legibility in reconstructed texture); thin geometry (paper-thin pages, individually)
cases.notes: Environment: indoor, flat surface. Lighting: even overhead lighting, no glare on pages. Motion: partial arc (not full 360° — book has a clear "front" only), ~120° sweep over the open book.

cases.prompt_or_spec: A person's hand holding a small object (e.g., an apple), object rotated by hand rather than camera moving, indoor plain background behind hand
stresses: Dynamic/occlusion content within an otherwise static scene — tests segmentation of the target object from a moving occluder (hand) and whether occluded frames degrade or are correctly down-weighted
cases.notes: Environment: indoor, plain background behind hand. Lighting: soft even lighting. Motion: camera mostly static, object rotated through ~360° by hand, occasional brief hand occlusion of part of the object.

cases.prompt_or_spec: A simple two-part toy or mechanism with one moving part articulated through its range during the video (e.g., a pair of pliers opened/closed, a hinged box lid raised/lowered), indoor on plain table, camera orbits slowly (~180°) while the part is articulated partway through the capture
stresses: The genuine L7 dynamics-layer trigger case — deliberately dynamic content, tests 4DGS/deformable path activation vs. the static-scene default, and whether AURIGA correctly reports which frames correspond to which articulation state
cases.notes: Environment: indoor, plain table. Lighting: even indoor lighting. Motion: camera orbits slowly (~180°) while the part is articulated partway through the capture (held in 2-3 distinct poses, a few seconds each).
